name: yeco-lens
description: X-ray vision for your LLM. Watch every token's confidence, hunt entropy spikes, and fork reality mid-generation.
author: YecoAI <hello@yeco.ai>

scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @yecoai-org/protocol && npm run build --workspace @yecoai-org/server && tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json
